labels.notes: Kaden 9:46 — rib pain follow-up, parent + child. Clinical content correct. Procedure section is hallucinated: 'Performed physical examination of chest and back' cites transcript fragment 'You're done, my friend. Come on up.' — that's a friendly farewell, not procedure evidence. Physical exam is part of the assessment code, NOT a billable procedure. Diagnostic code 786 (Epistaxis/hemoptysis/cough) is wrong sub-grouping for MSK rib pain — should be 729 (musculoskeletal). Session was inappropriately split at 14:25:59 producing a 4-min phantom session 049967be that should have been merge-backed. Failure modes: SOAP-procedure-hallucination, dx-code-mis-grouping, false-split (no merge-back).
